title: 30 Next Time Preview
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 Next Time Preview             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Tue Jan 26, 2010 10:23 pm Well I only found one thread where these were mentioned, and for some reason that thread was locked. I just was skimming through the preview of 3.0 and wondered if anyone was interested in what was stated on each sign that said "Keep Out". It doesn't seem to be anywhere in the Evapedia that I can find. The moderators can feel free to smack me down if I didn't look hard enough, but I thought they were interesting enough to share: Eva-01 Restricted Area No Entry Beyond This Point Tokyo-III Near Third Impact Ground Zero Near Third Impact Eyewitness Debriefing in Progress No Entry Without Authority Lilith Preservation Site Access Strictly Restricted Eva 08 Construction Area No Unauthorized Entry Allowed SEELE Children's Assembly in Session Do Not Enter Private Conference Between Mari Makinami Illustrious & [********] Do Not Enter

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Jan 26, 2010 11:06 pm Ground Zero. Site of First or Second Impact perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 26, 2010 11:09 pm You want to read this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6973

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 26, 2010 11:16 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=263009#263009 Reichu wrote: - The frozen Eva-01 with Rei and Shinji still absorbed. [ Keep Out . Eva-01 Restricted Area. No Entry Beyond This Point.] - The fortress city abandoned. [ Keep Out . Tokyo-III. Near Third Impact. Ground Zero.] - Nerv personnel held in confinement. [ Keep Out . Near Third Impact Eyewitness. Debriefing in Progress. No Entry Without Authority.] - Eva Unit 06 being taken down to Dogma. [ Keep Out . Lilith Preservation Site. Access Strictly Restricted.] - The quickening Eva Unit 08 and its pilot. [ Keep Out . Eva-08 Construction Area. No Unauthorized Entry Allowed.] - And the children chosen by fate finally assemble. [ Keep Out . Seele Children's Assembly In Session. Do Not Enter.] - Where will this tale of people yearning for life continue to go? [ Keep Out . Private Conference Between Mari Makinami Illustrious & ________. Do Not Enter.] - Next time, Evangelion New Movie Edition: Q Quickening - I'll give you plenty of fan service next time, too!

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Wed Jan 27, 2010 12:38 am Ah, thank you. For some reason that particular post didn't show up in my search. I guess I should use better search terms. wonderluster wrote: Ground Zero. Site of First or Second Impact perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 27, 2010 1:27 am JoeD80 wrote: Ah, thank you. For some reason that particular post didn't show up in my search. I guess I should use better search terms.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Wed Jan 27, 2010 1:31 am Reichu wrote: "Caption" is probably less confusing and more accurate than "sign".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 27, 2010 2:30 am They're using "keep out signs" as a thematic motif for the captions in the preview. They're giving us brief glimpses of the next movie, the bulk of which is currently "off limits" to the audience. I guess it's possible that actual signs may appear somewhere in the movie, but for now they're just captions.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Jan 27, 2010 11:05 am Reichu wrote: They're using "keep out signs" as a thematic motif for the captions in the preview. They're giving us brief glimpses of the next movie, the bulk of which is currently "off limits" to the audience. I guess it's possible that actual signs may appear somewhere in the movie, but for now they're just captions.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 27, 2010 11:08 am The eyecatch after the opening number... KEEP OUT Evangelion New Movie Edition Q Quickening

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Jan 27, 2010 1:05 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 27, 2010 1:11 pm I just noticed Kaji with a gun. A possible twist on his murder scene? I hope so!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jan 27, 2010 1:24 pm lol Kaji kills Sarai.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Jan 27, 2010 1:37 pm Also, Karowu`s hair is either wet or sweaty....Maybe after his decent to Dogma, he meets somebody (fours Shadows being the FAR) and the wetness of his hair being LCL from his entry plug

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Jan 27, 2010 2:32 pm wonderluster wrote: And Mari looks pretty serious, takin her glasses off and whatnaught

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Jan 27, 2010 2:59 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I just noticed Kaji with a gun. A possible twist on his murder scene? I hope so!

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Jan 27, 2010 3:13 pm Shinji 1 Asuka 2 Rei 3 Mari 4.....Then Kaworu Standin roun like a badass....5.....Touji....Eva 8....... ( EXPLODES DUE TO OVERLOAD )

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Wed Jan 27, 2010 5:34 pm It looks like Asuka will be piloting again given she gets ANOTHER new plugsuit. Pause at :22 of wonderlusters link, her suit has some kind of blue collar thang.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Wed Jan 27, 2010 5:49 pm It looks identical to her original plugsuit. Here's a link to the trailer http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SvWPRNltwZk&feature=related Pause at :39. No blue. Now go back to the wonder's vid, blue on neck and collar. I suppose she is either just getting a new plugsuit, or will be piloting a new Eva.[/img] EDIT: THIS IS NOT A DOUBLE POST. The PRPD's previous post evaporated.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 27, 2010 5:55 pm Yup, new plug suit. In addition to the modified collar it also looks like the plug suit has a darker shade of red but this is from the cam-rip so we can't say for sure about that it is a darker shade. I wish there was a DVD rip already. =_= EDIT: Mad wrote: EDIT: THIS IS NOT A DOUBLE POST. The PRPD's previous post evaporated.
